name: pm-groundwork
description: A Claude Code starter kit for program, project, and product managers. Works in terminal and Cursor. Persistent memory, structured decision logging, GSD workflow integration, and a tailored setup interview — all in one installable plugin.

commands.name: pm-setup
commands.description: Bootstrap a new PM project workspace with a guided interview. Creates all management files, initializes decision logging, and tailors everything to your project and working style.

commands.name: pm-end-session
commands.description: End-of-session wrap-up. Updates memory, logs decisions, syncs GSD state, and backs up to git if configured.
